title: Scanned RFQ - Motor Base Plates
subject: Scanned RFQ: Carbon Steel Motor Base Plates
body: Forwarding a scanned RFQ received from our buyer. Please review and confirm whether the OCR output is good enough for quotation prep.
description: Scenario oriented to OCR fallback using a scanned-style PDF generated at runtime.
